memoryArtifacts.headline: Joan Leche (c. 1450 – March 1530)
memoryArtifacts.description: Joan Leche (c. 1450 – March 1530), benefactress, was the wife successively of Thomas Bodley, and of Thomas Bradbury, Lord Mayor of London in 1509. She founded a chantry in London, and a grammar school …

zh.lifeSummary: Joan Leche是Denis Leche和Elizabeth的女兒，於1450年出生。她於1486年與Thomas Bodley在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾維林波洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年3月享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Leche是Denis Leche和Elizabeth的女儿，于1450年出生。她于1486年与Thomas Bodley在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾維林波洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1530年3月享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Leche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of   Letch   or   Leech  .

variants.name: Letch
meanings: English: locative name, either topographic from Middle English lech(e), lecche, lache ‘sluggish stream, wet place’ (Old English * læcc(e), * lecc(e) ‘stream’), or toponymic from a place named with this word, such as Lach Dennis and Lache (both Cheshire) and Eastleach and Northleach (both Gloucs).

variants.name: Leech
meanings: Irish (Galway):English name adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó MaolMhaodhóg (see Logue ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Leche was born in 1450 as the daughter of Denis Leche and Elizabeth. She married Thomas Bodley in 1486, in Wellingborough, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in March 1530, at the age of 80, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Leche est née en 1450, fille de Denis Leche et Elizabeth. Elle a épousé Thomas Bodley en 1486, à Wellingborough, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en mars 1530, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Leche wurde 1450, als Tochter von Denis Leche und Elizabeth geboren. Sie hat 1486 in Wellingborough, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Bodley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im März 1530 im Alter von 80 Jahren und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Leche è nata il nel 1450 come figlia di Denis Leche e Elizabeth. Lei sposato Thomas Bodley nel 1486, nel Wellingborough, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1530, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Lecheは1450年にDenis LecheとElizabethの娘として生まれた。1486年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウエリングボロウでThomas Bodleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1530年3月に80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Leche(은)는 1450년 Denis Leche(와)과 Elizabeth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1486년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 웰잉버루그h에서 Thomas Bodley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 3월 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

mn.Wellingborough, Northamptonshire, Englan: Wellingborough, North Hamtunscire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Leche nasceu em 1450 filha de Denis Leche e Elizabeth. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bodley em 1486, em Wellingborough, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em março de 1530, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Leche родилась в 1450 г. Её родителей звали Denis Leche и Elizabeth. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bodley в 1486 г. в местности веллингбороую, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла марта 1530 г. в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Joan Leche nació en 1450 como hija de Denis Leche y Elizabeth. Se casó con Thomas Bodley en 1486, en Wellingborough, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1530, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
